name: Chicken & Potatoes Francais
recipeIngredient: 2/3 lb (2 medium) potatoes - cut into 1/2-inch cubes
2 Chicken breast halves - boned and skinned (about 4 ounces each)
1 tbsp Fresh tarragon, chopped OR 1/2 tsp Dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a shallow 1-quart microwave-safe dish.
2. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 3 minutes.
4. Coat a large nonstick skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
5. Add potatoes and onions; push to one side and add chicken.
6. Cook over medium heat, tossing potatoes occasionally and turning chicken once until potatoes are tender and juices run clear when chicken is pierced (about 15 minutes).
7. Season with salt and pepper. Remove chicken and potatoes to a platter; keep hot.
8. Add garlic to the skillet; mix in mustard, tarragon, and wine. Cook over high heat for 1 minute.
9. Remove from heat; whisk in sour cream. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Pour sauce over chicken.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt microwave. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
